project.name: 心镜 · 治愈书房重设计

intentProfile.routingReason: User requests new UI design for existing app, no restoration target, no active Design Library

project.designRead: desktop client app / solo psychotherapist / warm healing study / balanced / avoid purple-blue tech feel
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Cream-white warm base, warm gray-brown text, sage green accent. Rounded cards, soft shadows, serif headings for warmth. Organic shapes, no sharp edges. Professional yet comforting, like a quiet study room.

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: single brand hue: sage green #7A9E7E used for primary CTA, active nav states, and key interactive elements
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: free-explore uses no secondary/accent brand hue; extra hues only through semantic state tokens (success, warning, danger, info)
colorSystem.stateColors: success=#7A9E7E, warning=#C9A45C, danger=#BF7B7B, info=#7A9EAA with matching soft background tints

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: rounded-warm: radius-md=12px for cards, radius-lg=16px for larger surfaces, radius-sm=6px for small controls, radius-xl=20px for modals. No sharp corners anywhere.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: serif for headings/brand (Noto Serif SC), sans for body/UI (Inter/Noto Sans SC). Heading weights 600. Body 14px, line-height 1.6. Numbers in mono for data.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 16px base gap, 24px large gap, 10px small gap. Content max-width 1080px. Sidebar 220px.
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: clean minimal controls: border-first cards (no shadow on static cards), warm-tinted borders, pill-shaped tags, rounded buttons with subtle hover. No bezel/double-border effects.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first layering: static cards use 1px border only (no shadow). Floating layers (modal/dropdown) may use shadow-md. Shadow alpha always <= 0.06 for static, <= 0.10 for floating.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Lucide icons throughout. No emoji. No decorative illustrations. Warm-toned avatar circles with initials.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: gentle: 0.2s ease transitions, subtle hover background tints, no dramatic transforms. Focus uses sage green ring.

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: Left sidebar 220px, cream-sunken background (#F3EFE8), border-right with sand color. Brand mark at top (serif '心镜' in a rounded sage-green square). Nav items: vertical list, rounded-md hover, sage-soft active background with sage text. Each item has Lucide icon + Chinese label. data-nav-key on each item.
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single sage green hue #7A9E7E for all primary interactive elements
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Noto Serif SC for brand/headings, Inter/Noto Sans SC for body. 14px base, 1.6 line-height.
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: sm=6px, md=12px, lg=16px, xl=20px. Cards always use md or lg.
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-first: static cards use 1px solid var(--xj-border) with no shadow. Only floating layers get shadow.
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary CTA: sage green bg, white text, rounded-lg, 40px height, font-medium. Hover: darker sage. Ghost: transparent with sage border.
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content, centered stat numbers, flex row layouts with explicit gap

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Warm cream palette, sage green accent, border-first surface model, serif headings, rounded shapes

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: Therapist daily dashboard: no sidebar, centered content, module grid, KPI stats, slide-out AI panel
pages.visualNorthStar: A calm, warm dashboard that feels like glancing at a well-organized desk in a sunlit study room
qualityRisks: CJK text length in module cards

pages.title: 咨询记录
pages.businessScenario: Two-column form editor: APA/SOAP/DAP structured notes on left, persistent AI chat dock on right. Client selected via dropdown.
pages.visualNorthStar: A focused writing environment — clean form with labeled textareas, quiet AI assistant available without competing for attention
